description: After a long break in sunny California, I’m back at school for my last semester in snowy Michigan! Excited to share more updates soon!
Our CUDA Optimization project hit the leaderboard at 6th place out of 32 teams with a 341× speedup over a single-threaded CPU baseline!
Happy to share that the website is now live :D
The first week being a GSI! Welcome to my office hours :)
Kick starting my second year of graduate studies at UMich!
